package rulecoverage

func NegativeEnvParsingRepeatedInInit() string {
    ruleID := "env_parsing_repeated_in_init"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "multiple `os.Getenv` + `strconv.Atoi` / `strconv.ParseBool` chains that could be replaced with a config struct + `envconfig` or `env` library"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
